languages.text: {n}Гудение, доносящееся из внутренних частей аугментированного тела магоса, становится тише — и звучит почти разочарованно.{/n}
{n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Гудение, доносящееся из внутренних частей аугментированного тела магоса, становится тише — и звучит почти разочарованно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}
{n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}
{n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

languages.text: {n}贤者加装了植入物的躯体内的嗡鸣声渐渐变弱，听起来甚至带着一丝失落。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者加装了植入物的躯体内的嗡鸣声渐渐变弱，听起来甚至带着一丝失落。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le bourdonnement des mécanismes internes du corps augmenté du magos s'atténue et semble presque déçu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le bourdonnement des mécanismes internes du corps augmenté du magos s'atténue et semble presque déçu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Magos'un ogmentli vücudunun iç mekanizmalarının uğultusu azalıyor. Kulağa neredeyse hayal kırıklığına uğramış gibi geliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Magos'un ogmentli vücudunun iç mekanizmalarının uğultusu azalıyor. Kulağa neredeyse hayal kırıklığına uğramış gibi geliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El zumbido del funcionamiento interno del cuerpo aumentado del magos se acalla, como decepcionado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El zumbido del funcionamiento interno del cuerpo aumentado del magos se acalla, como decepcionado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Summen im augmentierten Körper des Magos wird leiser — und klingt beinahe enttäuscht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Summen im augmentierten Körper des Magos wird leiser — und klingt beinahe enttäuscht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}マゴスの強化された身体の内部の動きが、静かになっていく。そして、まるでがっかりしているかのような音に。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The humming of the inner workings of the Magos's augmented body grows quieter — and sounds almost disappointed.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}マゴスの強化された身体の内部の動きが、静かになっていく。そして、まるでがっかりしているかのような音に。{/n}
